titles.title: Barona Group of Capitan Grande Band of Mission Indians Land Transfer Act of 2026
Barona Group of Capitan Grande Band of Mission Indians Land Transfer Act of 2026
To take certain land in the State of California into trust for the benefit of the Barona Group of Capitan Grande Band of Mission Indians of the Barona Reservation, California, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Natural Resources.
